properties.description: Welcome to Mallory Square where the fun starts and the sun sets. Everything Key West is famous for comes together in this one special place set on historic waterfront. Mallory Square is home to shops, restaurants, and many of the islands most popular attractions. Come for the day and stay into the night. There's always something happening in Mallory Square.

properties.name: Mallory Square

properties.description: This street is the bustling heart of Key West, and a great spot to experience the city's culture and nightlife. It's filled with fantastic restaurants, lively bars, art galleries, and shops selling unique gifts, clothes, and hand-rolled cigars. And don't forget to stand in line to take a photo at the Southernmost Point Buoy, which is just a block away. In the evening, you sip on a margarita and enjoy an al fresco meal, or join a haunted pub crawl and ghost tour of the area. Visit during the shoulder season between March and May when the weather is still pleasant, and the crowds are smaller. – Tripadvisor

properties.description: Operated by the Key West Art & Historical Society, the Keys oldest cultural non-profit. The mission of the Key West Art & Historical Society is to preserve the culture of the Florida Keys through exhibiting and displaying regional art, architecture and history for the purpose of educating the community and visiting public.

properties.name: Key West Lighthouse and Keeper's Quarters Museum

properties.description: As Florida’s only presidential museum, the Harry S. Truman Little White House was the winter White House for this country's 33rd president. Truman spent 175 days during 13 vacations in the home that is filled with original furnishing and memorabilia from Truman’s days. Presidents Taft, Eisenhower, Kennedy, Carter and Clinton also used the house. Guided tours offer guests a window into the world President Truman and life of a US president.

properties.name: Truman Little White House

properties.description: Ernest Hemingway lived and wrote in this for ten years. During that time he wrote seventy percent of his life-time works. Today we operate as a museum providing guided tours every fifteen minutes from nine to five. The Museum is available for weddings and corporate events. Visit this National Historic Landmark, Literary Landmark and recognized by the Library of Congress for its importance in U.S. History. Grand Architecture, Lush Gardens, Educational Tours, Book Store/Gift Shop and the world famous Poly dactyl (six-toed cats).

properties.description: Walk among hundreds of living butterflies and colorful birds! Take a stroll through a tropical paradise… walk through an exotic and inviting environment filled with hundreds of the most beautiful winged creatures in nature –butterflies. During your breathtaking journey, you will experience an impressive collection of flowering plants, cascading waterfalls and trees that set the stage for the “flowers of the sky.” Witness some 50 to 60 different species from around the world, as well as varieties of colorful birds, all under a climate-controlled, glass-enclosed habitat.

properties.query: Plan a 3-day trip for 5 people traveling from Dallas to Key West from November 1st to November 3rd, 2024. The budget is $6,450. Accommodations should be an entire home that allows visitors. Include dining options featuring Seafood, Caribbean, Latin, and American cuisines.

properties.name: Key West Cuban Coffee Shop
properties.description: Key West is home to one of the best Cuban restaurants around. Perfect for birthdays, holidays, or just a night out, Cuban Coffee has something for everyone. The food brings out the bright and spicy flavors of Latin America that will tantalize your taste buds. Whether you’re a local looking for an authentic and traditional Cuban experience, or a visitor looking to take a bite out of something new, definitely go check it out! This super cozy spot is sure to make the perfect evening of amazing conversation and Cuban cuisine! Somos un negocio familiar con authentico savor Latino con mucha variedad para el gozo de todos , salsas frescas todos los días sándwich ,Empanadas, Arepas,Burritos,tacos ,Quesadillas , Bowl, vegan , gluten free, y muchos más . Auténtico chorizo mexicano echo por nosotros para ustedes .

properties.name: Kaya island Eats
properties.description: Kaya's laid back tropical atmosphere featuring island cuisine including Locally caught fish, Rasta pasta, Jamaican jerk chicken wings, and Tropical libations like the Key West Colada and homemade Key Lime Pie. Come discover Kaya and create some lasting island memories.

properties.name: Two Friends Patio Restaurant
properties.description: Experience the true Island flavor of the original Key West. Our restaurant and bar specializes in local seafood dishes including shrimp, fish, lobster, oysters, conch, and crab, and we proudly serve the Island's best char-grilled steaks and burgers. Not only is our seafood both fresh and delicious, but can be enjoyed on our patio for live music on Duval Street with salty ocean air. We'll see you soon!
